pre_run_command.command: if [[ '${command}' == *'rm -rf'* ]]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command'; exit 2; fi
if [[ '${command}' == *'just down --all'* ]]; then echo 'WARNING: This will stop ALL tilt stacks on this host. Confirm intentional.'; fi
if [[ '${command}' == *'just db-reset-hard'* ]]; then echo 'WARNING: db-reset-hard drops and recreates the database. All data will be lost.'; fi

post_run_command.command: if [[ '${command}' == *'just wt-add'* ]]; then just wt-list; fi
if [[ '${command}' == *'just wt-remove'* ]]; then just wt-list; fi
